category-def.name: kotlin
category-def.label: Kotlin Dependencies
category-def.description: Dependencies for blockchain simulators that are using Kotlin.

category-def.name: bscm
category-def.label: Blockchain Systems Component Model (BSCM)
category-def.description: Blockchain Systems Component Model (BSCM) is a metamodel used to create models for Palladio-based blockchain simulators.

category-def.name: core
category-def.label: Blockchain Simulator Core
category-def.description: Core features for Palladio-based blockchain simulators.

category-def.name: threesim
category-def.label: 3SIM
category-def.description: 3SIM blockchain simulator for investigating the Blockchain Trilemma.
